name: Apple-Oat Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the rolled oats, flour, baking powder, and cinnamon in a bowl.
2. Add the eggs and milk (or apple juice) to the dry ingredients. Mix well.
3. Stir in the grated apple and vanilla extract, if using.
4. Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and lightly oil it.
5. Pour about one-fourth of the batter onto the hot skillet.
6. Use a spatula to spread the batter evenly until it's about 1/3 inch thick.
7. Cook for a few minutes or until bubbles form on the surface and the edges start to dry out.
8. Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional minute or until golden brown.
